enquiry_ack.subject: Thanks for your enquiry – {{ client_name }} – {{ event_date }}
enquiry_ack.body:
Hi {{ client_first_name }},

Thanks for getting in touch about your {{ event_type }} on {{ event_date }}.

I'll check our availability in the first instance and come back to you shortly with details and pricing.

Thanks so much,
Motti
